archetype: Archetype 5 (Luxury) mixed with subtle Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon)

brand.name: Oculux AI Glasses
brand.vibe: Ultra-premium, high-performance tech meets everyday luxury

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-medium tracking-tight leading-none

surface_styles.card: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:border-white/20 transition-colors duration-300
surface_styles.glowing_edge: relative before:absolute before:-inset-[1px] before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-[#00F0FF]/50 before:to-transparent before:rounded-full before:opacity-0 hover:before:opacity-100 before:transition-opacity before:duration-500

hero.composition: Asymmetric left-aligned content overlaying full-bleed background
hero.background_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-black/90 via-black/50 to-transparent
hero.cta: bg-white text-black px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-medium hover:scale-105 transition-transform flex items-center gap-2

pdp_product_grid.card_style: group relative aspect-[4/5] bg-[#0A0A0A] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden
pdp_product_grid.image_behavior: object-cover w-full h-full transform group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700
pdp_product_grid.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/80 via-transparent to-transparent opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity

tech_spec_teardown.visual: Exploded view of glasses pulling apart to reveal AI chip, camera, open-ear audio
tech_spec_teardown.markers: Floating hot-spots with pulsing cyan glow linking to detail popovers

ar_launcher.placement: Sticky floating bottom-right or prominent on PDP
ar_launcher.style: bg-[#121212] border border-[#00F0FF]/30 text-[#00F0FF] rounded-full px-6 py-3 flex items-center gap-3 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.2)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,240,255,0.4)] transition-shadow backdrop-blur-md

social_reels_grid.item_style: aspect-[9/16] rounded-xl overflow-hidden relative group cursor-pointer
social_reels_grid.play_button: absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/40 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity

cart_drawer.style: fixed right-0 top-0 h-full w-[400px] bg-[#0A0A0A] border-l border-white/10 shadow-2xl transform transition-transform z-[60]

footer.input: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-[#00F0FF] w-full

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle scale up (scale-105), opacity increases, and border color shifts to cyan/white.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in and slide up from bottom (y: 20 -> y: 0) with opacity (0 -> 1) over 0.6s ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Elements reveal on scroll using intersection observer, staggered children for lists/grids.

hero.description: Cinematic portrait of man looking through glass at night, neon reflections, representing the flagship smart glasses experience.

collection_kids.description: Cinematic shot of child wearing sunglasses in dramatic lighting, representing the Kids interactive learning tier.

collection_pro.description: Young professional woman wearing glasses in dark room, representing Youth/Pro productivity tier.

collection_senior.description: Senior woman wearing sunglasses in cinematic light, representing Seniors health monitoring tier.

product_showcase_1.description: Man with beard and luxury sunglasses on black background, highlighting premium aesthetics.

product_showcase_2.description: Man leaning on sports car at night wearing sunglasses, cinematic depth of field.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for complex structural marketing layouts (Hero, Teardown section, Reels Grid).
Use Shadcn UI for interactive elements like Select, Dialog, Sheet (Cart Drawer), Tabs, but heavily customize them to remove default styling and match the dark, high-contrast, premium aesthetic.
Implement scroll-triggered animations using framer-motion, particularly for the 'Tech Spec Teardown' section.
Do NOT use Inter or Roboto. Follow the defined Clash Display / Outfit font pair.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
The site must be mobile-responsive, utilizing 'glassmorphic' navigation and touch-friendly targets.
Utilize the provided image URLs exclusively for the designated sections.
